inputs.label: Number 3
inputs.businessContext: Third number (optional, set to 1 if unused in multiplication, or 0 if unused in addition)

businessContext_i18n.en: Third number (optional, set to 1 if unused in multiplication, or 0 if unused in addition)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üçüncü sayı (isteğe bağlı, çarpmada kullanılmıyorsa 1, toplamada kullanılmıyorsa 0 olarak ayarlayın)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dritte Zahl (optional, auf 1 setzen, wenn nicht in Multiplikation verwendet, oder 0, wenn nicht in Addition verwendet)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Troisième nombre (facultatif, mettre 1 si non utilisé dans la multiplication, ou 0 si non utilisé dans l'addition)
businessContext_i18n.es: Tercer número (opcional, establecer en 1 si no se usa en multiplicación, o 0 si no se usa en suma)

inputs.label: Number 4
inputs.businessContext: Fourth number (optional, set to 1 if unused in multiplication, or 0 if unused in addition)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fourth number (optional, set to 1 if unused in multiplication, or 0 if unused in addition)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dördüncü sayı (isteğe bağlı, çarpmada kullanılmıyorsa 1, toplamada kullanılmıyorsa 0 olarak ayarlayın)
businessContext_i18n.de: Vierte Zahl (optional, auf 1 setzen, wenn nicht in Multiplikation verwendet, oder 0, wenn nicht in Addition verwendet)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quatrième nombre (facultatif, mettre 1 si non utilisé dans la multiplication, ou 0 si non utilisé dans l'addition)
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuarto número (opcional, establecer en 1 si no se usa en multiplicación, o 0 si no se usa en suma)

inputs.label: Operation
inputs.businessContext: 1 = addition/subtraction (rounds to fewest decimal places), 2 = multiplication/division (rounds to fewest significant figures)

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 = addition/subtraction (rounds to fewest decimal places), 2 = multiplication/division (rounds to fewest significant figures)
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = toplama/çıkarma (en az ondalık basamağa yuvarlar), 2 = çarpma/bölme (en az anlamlı basamağa yuvarlar)
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 = Addition/Subtraktion (rundet auf die wenigsten Dezimalstellen), 2 = Multiplikation/Division (rundet auf die wenigsten signifikanten Stellen)
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 = addition/soustraction (arrondit au plus petit nombre de décimales), 2 = multiplication/division (arrondit au plus petit nombre de chiffres significatifs)
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = suma/resta (redondea al menor número de decimales), 2 = multiplicación/división (redondea al menor número de cifras significativas)

formulas.rawResult: operation == 1 ? (num1 + num2 + num3 + num4) : (num1 * num2 * num3 * num4)
formulas.rawResult_aux: operation == 1 ? (num1 + num2 + num3 + num4) : (num1 * num2 * num3 * num4)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
